name: sovereign-compute-network
description: I-AM-IOS v5 — Sovereign substrate: deterministic event-driven OS with rekernel, WASM kernel, JSONFlow, P2P fabric, and sovereign app suite

scripts.build:rekernel: cd rekernel && npx tsc -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 || true
scripts.build:dmr: cd dmr-upgrade && npx tsc -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 || true
scripts.build: npm run build:rekernel && npm run build:dmr
scripts.check: node --input-type=module --eval "import('./sovereign-network.js').then(m => console.log('[check] sovereign-network.js imports OK', Object.keys(m)))"
